findings.name: Public S3 Bucket
findings.description: Publicly readable S3 bucket detected. This likely violates NDPA data protection obligations.

findings.name: Encryption in Transit Not Enforced
findings.description: Plaintext HTTP detected. NDPA 2023 s.39 requires appropriate technical measures; personal data must be encrypted in transit.
findings.remediation: Use HTTPS/TLS. Set protocol to HTTPS and redirect HTTP to HTTPS, or enable rds.force_ssl.

findings.name: Data Hosted Outside Approved Region
findings.description: Cloud region outside af-south-1 detected. Hosting Nigerian personal data abroad triggers NDPA 2023 s.41 cross-border transfer obligations.
findings.remediation: Use af-south-1 unless a lawful cross-border transfer basis under s.41-43 is documented.

findings.name: Publicly Accessible Database
findings.description: Publicly accessible database detected. This exposes personal data and likely violates NDPA 2023 s.39 confidentiality obligations.
findings.remediation: Set publicly_accessible = false and place the database in a private subnet.

findings.remediation: Add a non-root USER instruction, e.g., USER 1001.

findings.name: Hardcoded Secret in Dockerfile ENV
findings.description: Secret or credential set via ENV in Dockerfile.
findings.remediation: Use Docker secrets or pass environment variables at runtime.

findings.name: Unpinned Docker Image
findings.description: Docker image is unpinned (explicit :latest or no tag). Builds are non-reproducible.
findings.remediation: Pin to a specific version tag or image digest, e.g. FROM node:18.20.0-slim.

findings.name: Paystack Live Secret Key

findings.remediation: Rotate the key immediately and store it in an environment variable or secrets manager.

findings.name: Data Sovereignty Violation (us-east-1)
findings.description: AWS us-east-1 region detected. Nigerian user data should be hosted in af-south-1 (Cape Town) per NDPA 2023 data localisation recommendations.
findings.remediation: Change region to af-south-1 unless an explicit cross-border transfer agreement is in place.

findings.name: Data Sovereignty Violation (us-east-1)

findings.name: Missing Encryption at Rest

findings.remediation: Set encrypted = true for all storage resources.

findings.name: Missing Encryption at Rest

findings.name: Public S3 Bucket
findings.description: Publicly readable S3 bucket detected. This likely violates NDPA data protection obligations.
findings.remediation: Set bucket ACL to private and use pre-signed URLs for access.

findings.name: Encryption in Transit Not Enforced
findings.description: Plaintext HTTP detected. NDPA 2023 s.39 requires appropriate technical measures; personal data must be encrypted in transit.
findings.remediation: Use HTTPS/TLS. Set protocol to HTTPS and redirect HTTP to HTTPS, or enable rds.force_ssl.

findings.name: Data Hosted Outside Approved Region
findings.description: Cloud region outside af-south-1 detected. Hosting Nigerian personal data abroad triggers NDPA 2023 s.41 cross-border transfer obligations.
findings.remediation: Use af-south-1 unless a lawful cross-border transfer basis under s.41-43 is documented.

findings.name: Publicly Accessible Database
findings.description: Publicly accessible database detected. This exposes personal data and likely violates NDPA 2023 s.39 confidentiality obligations.
findings.remediation: Set publicly_accessible = false and place the database in a private subnet.

findings.remediation: Add a non-root USER instruction, e.g., USER 1001.

findings.name: Hardcoded Secret in Dockerfile ENV
findings.description: Secret or credential set via ENV in Dockerfile.
findings.remediation: Use Docker secrets or pass environment variables at runtime.

findings.name: Unpinned Docker Image
findings.description: Docker image is unpinned (explicit :latest or no tag). Builds are non-reproducible.
findings.remediation: Pin to a specific version tag or image digest, e.g. FROM node:18.20.0-slim.

findings.name: Data Sovereignty Violation (us-east-1)
findings.description: AWS us-east-1 region detected. Nigerian user data should be hosted in af-south-1 (Cape Town) per NDPA 2023 data localisation recommendations.
findings.remediation: Change region to af-south-1 unless an explicit cross-border transfer agreement is in place.

findings.name: Data Sovereignty Violation (us-east-1)
findings.description: AWS us-east-1 region detected. Nigerian user data should be hosted in af-south-1 (Cape Town) per NDPA 2023 data localisation recommendations.
findings.remediation: Change region to af-south-1 unless an explicit cross-border transfer agreement is in place.

findings.name: Missing Encryption at Rest
findings.description: Encryption at rest is disabled. NDPA 2023 requires appropriate technical safeguards.
findings.remediation: Set encrypted = true for all storage resources.

findings.name: Missing Encryption at Rest
findings.description: Encryption at rest is disabled. NDPA 2023 requires appropriate technical safeguards.
findings.remediation: Set encrypted = true for all storage resources.

findings.name: Public S3 Bucket
findings.description: Publicly readable S3 bucket detected. This likely violates NDPA data protection obligations.
findings.remediation: Set bucket ACL to private and use pre-signed URLs for access.

findings.name: Encryption in Transit Not Enforced
findings.description: Plaintext HTTP detected. NDPA 2023 s.39 requires appropriate technical measures; personal data must be encrypted in transit.
findings.remediation: Use HTTPS/TLS. Set protocol to HTTPS and redirect HTTP to HTTPS, or enable rds.force_ssl.

findings.name: Data Hosted Outside Approved Region
findings.description: Cloud region outside af-south-1 detected. Hosting Nigerian personal data abroad triggers NDPA 2023 s.41 cross-border transfer obligations.
findings.remediation: Use af-south-1 unless a lawful cross-border transfer basis under s.41-43 is documented.

findings.name: Publicly Accessible Database
findings.description: Publicly accessible database detected. This exposes personal data and likely violates NDPA 2023 s.39 confidentiality obligations.
findings.remediation: Set publicly_accessible = false and place the database in a private subnet.

findings.name: Flutterwave Secret Key
findings.description: Flutterwave secret key exposed in source code.
findings.remediation: Rotate the key immediately and store it in a secrets manager.
